build.buildCommand: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --filter @roamly/api && pnpm --filter @roamly/api exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter @roamly/api run build

deploy.startCommand: apps/api/node_modules/.bin/prisma migrate deploy --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma && node apps/api/dist/src/main.js
